clockwise_induced_current_count: How many panels have a clockwise induced current in the loop?
Count the panels where the induced current would be clockwise.
Using the shown flux-change cues, how many loops have clockwise induced current?
How many of the six induction panels produce clockwise current?
Count the mini-panels whose loop current is induced clockwise.
counterclockwise_induced_current_count: How many panels have a counterclockwise induced current in the loop?
Count the panels where the induced current would be counterclockwise.
Using the shown flux-change cues, how many loops have counterclockwise induced current?
How many of the six induction panels produce counterclockwise current?
Count the mini-panels whose loop current is induced counterclockwise.
no_induced_current_count: How many panels have no induced current in the loop?
Count the panels where the loop would have no induced current.
Using the shown flux-change cues, how many loops have no induced current?
How many of the six induction panels produce no current?
Count the mini-panels whose loop has no induced current.

scene:electromagnetic_induction_panel_gr.object_description: six mini-panels showing conducting loops, into-page or out-of-page magnetic-field symbols, and visible cues for changing or unchanged magnetic flux

query:clockwise_induced_current_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the full mini-panels whose loop has clockwise induced current; use an empty array [] if none match
query:clockwise_induced_current_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of mini-panels whose loop has clockwise induced current

query:counterclockwise_induced_current_c.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the full mini-panels whose loop has counterclockwise induced current; use an empty array [] if none match
query:counterclockwise_induced_current_c.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of mini-panels whose loop has counterclockwise induced current

query:no_induced_current_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the full mini-panels whose loop has no induced current; use an empty array [] if none match
query:no_induced_current_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of mini-panels whose loop has no induced current
